overall.description: First-person perspective from the bridge of a ship navigating through stormy coastal waters at night. The view includes operational navigation displays and a forward-facing window overlooking the deck, with a lightning strike briefly illuminating the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship navigation bridge with forward deck observation

events.description: lightning bolt strikes the ocean surface to port side, briefly illuminating the water and sky

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel's navigation systems while monitoring radar and chart displays during night transit

entered.detail: navigation display showing nautical chart with vessel position and coastal topography
circular radar display with rotating sweep showing surrounding water contacts
blue-tinted data display showing vessel telemetry and system status
forward deck of the vessel with safety railings and bow structure visible through the window
dark water surface extending to the horizon with subtle wave motion
metal safety railings on the forecastle deck visible through the bridge windows

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place inside a ship's navigation bridge at night, with the camera positioned behind the operator's console. Three illuminated displays dominate the view: a chart plotter on the left, a rotating radar in the center, and a status monitor on the right. Through the forward windows, the vessel's bow deck and dark ocean waters are visible. At approximately 8 seconds, a bright lightning flash illuminates the water to the port side, briefly revealing the sea surface before returning to darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady perspective from a ship's navigation bridge at night, shifting from a focused view of technical displays to a sudden, vivid glimpse of the stormy ocean. It begins behind the operator's console, where the glow of a chart plotter, a rotating radar, and a status monitor dominates the interior. As the camera looks past these screens toward the forward windows, the dark silhouette of the bow deck merges with the pitch-black waters of the sea. The scene then transforms instantly when a bright flash of lightning strikes to the port side, momentarily illuminating the churning surface of the water before the environment plunges back into deep darkness.
